name: SysKey Registry Keys Access
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: SysKey Registry Keys Access
SIGMA Description: Detects handle requests and access operations to specific registry keys to calculate the SysKey

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663')) AND "Object Type"='key' AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\jd' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\gbg' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\skew1' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\data') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SysKey Registry Keys Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663')) AND "Object Type"='key' AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\jd' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\gbg' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\skew1' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%lsa\data') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: SysKey Registry Keys Access
